WelcomeBack - Class in com.example.myapplication
A welcome back screen for all users who have previously created an account Displays the Users Name, and a message telling them Welcome Back Has a tap anywhere on screen feature which when done, redirects the user to their role based page (eg, Entrants to Events page)
WelcomeBack() - Constructor for class com.example.myapplication.WelcomeBack
 
WelcomeBackTest - Class in com.example.myapplication
Tests that the WelcomeBack Activity: Formats and displays the user's name correctly.
WelcomeBackTest() - Constructor for class com.example.myapplication.WelcomeBackTest
 
writeCsvToUri(Context, Uri, List<EnrolledEntrant>) - Static method in class com.example.myapplication.CsvExportHelper
Writes the CSV content to the URI the user chose in the file picker.
